$comment: internal — registry of every Ed25519 license-signing public key ever embedded in a Lingua build, keyed by RFC 7638 JWK thumbprint. Exactly one entry is active; ordered overlap entries may be pending or retiring until the rollout completes. The release/deploy/CI guard fails closed on undocumented, drifted, stale, duplicate, private, or invalid-status keyrings. Rotation runbook: docs/RELEASE_SECURITY.md § Licensing.

keys.note: Initial production keypair, embedded by implementation (commit 8d2836b8). Private half lives only as the Cloudflare Workers secret LINGUA_LICENSE_PRIVATE_KEY_JWK in license-server.
Prepared overlap key for the first production rotation. Private half is stored only as LINGUA_LICENSE_NEXT_PRIVATE_KEY_JWK; do not select it for signing until compatible keyring builds are deployed.
